sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, body VARCHAR(1000), key_name VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, body, key_name) VALUES (1, '<example>data</example>', 'key1');

SELECT dsig_template_ext(xtree_doc(body), sprintf('<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Signature xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#"><SignedInfo><CanonicalizationMethod Algorithm="http://www.w3.org/2001/10/xml-exc-c14n#"/><SignatureMethod Algorithm="%s"/></SignedInfo><SignatureValue></SignatureValue><KeyInfo><KeyName>%s</KeyName></KeyInfo></Signature>', xenc_get_key_algo(key_name), key_name), vector('wsse', 'http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd'), 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/', 'Body', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'Action', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'From', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'To', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'MessageID', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'ReplyTo', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'FaultTo', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'RelatesTo') FROM xml_data WHERE id = 1;

SELECT id, body, key_name, dsig_template_ext(xtree_doc(body), sprintf('<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Signature xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#"><SignedInfo><CanonicalizationMethod Algorithm="http://www.w3.org/2001/10/xml-exc-c14n#"/><SignatureMethod Algorithm="%s"/></SignedInfo><SignatureValue></SignatureValue><KeyInfo><KeyName>%s</KeyName></KeyInfo></Signature>', xenc_get_key_algo(key_name), key_name), vector('wsse', 'http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd'), 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/', 'Body', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'Action', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'From', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'To', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'MessageID', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'ReplyTo', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'FaultTo', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'RelatesTo') AS signature FROM xml_data WHERE CAST(key_name AS VARCHAR(50)) = 'key1';

SELECT 10 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xml_data) AS division_result, dsig_template_ext(xtree_doc(body), sprintf('<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Signature xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#"><SignedInfo><CanonicalizationMethod Algorithm="http://www.w3.org/2001/10/xml-exc-c14n#"/><SignatureMethod Algorithm="%s"/></SignedInfo><SignatureValue></SignatureValue><KeyInfo><KeyName>%s</KeyName></KeyInfo></Signature>', xenc_get_key_algo(key_name), key_name), vector('wsse', 'http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd'), 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/', 'Body', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'Action', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'From', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'To', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'MessageID', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'ReplyTo', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'FaultTo', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'RelatesTo') AS signature FROM xml_data HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;

SELECT key_name, dsig_template_ext(xtree_doc(body), sprintf('<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Signature xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/09/xmldsig#"><SignedInfo><CanonicalizationMethod Algorithm="http://www.w3.org/2001/10/xml-exc-c14n#"/><SignatureMethod Algorithm="%s"/></SignedInfo><SignatureValue></SignatureValue><KeyInfo><KeyName>%s</KeyName></KeyInfo></Signature>', xenc_get_key_algo(key_name), key_name), vector('wsse', 'http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd'), 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/', 'Body', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'Action', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'From', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'To', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'MessageID', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'ReplyTo', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'FaultTo', 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/03/addressing', 'RelatesTo') AS signature FROM xml_data WHERE body IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xml_data) / 1 <= 10;
